description: Flint, determined to stop the deaths, confronts the Kree Vicar and kills him with his powers in a display of newfound resolve. Sinara decides to use Flint as bait, setting up the next confrontation with S.H.I.E.L.D.

transcript.line: You. You know the whereabouts of the escaped Inhuman?
Yeah. I do. Too many people have died. Good people.
You were offered the highest honor a human could hope for, to join Kasius below and see others rewarded in kind. Now they'll get nothing. But good you turned yourself in.
I won't let any more innocent lives be lost. Not for me.
